nodes.name: Alethe
nodes.summary: Alethe（Alethe）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如White-tailed alethe、Fire-crested alethe。

nodes.name: White-tailed alethe
nodes.summary: The white-tailed alethe (Alethe diademata) is a species of bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae. It is found in western Africa from Senegal to Togo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It was recently split into two species from the fire-crested alethe (A. castanea). References
